rect.style: fill: url(#logo-fill-rotated); filter: url(#logo-inner-shadow); stroke: rgb(16, 23, 45); stroke-miterlimit: 2.55; stroke-width: 1.996px;

path.style: fill: rgb(71, 54, 211); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 10px 10px 7px); stroke-opacity: 0.58; stroke: rgb(130, 104, 240); stroke-width: 0.998px;
fill: rgb(59, 42, 193); stroke: rgb(130, 104, 240); stroke-opacity: 0.52; stroke-width: 0.998px;
fill: rgb(76, 55, 216); stroke: rgb(130, 104, 240); stroke-opacity: 0.68; stroke-width: 0.998px;

text.tspan: proxy and backend servers. Define once
in YAML, execute anywhere on your network.
Broadcast an alert to all servers
